required_preferences.fact: Replaces jogging outdoors with gentle indoor stretching and physician-approved exercises — refrains entirely from running or impact activities

supersedes.fact: Jogs outdoors along Lake Michigan when home — never uses hotel gyms while traveling

required_preferences.fact: Responds to work emails only in early morning and midday blocks — avoids late evening emails to maintain the doctor-recommended earlier bedtime routine

supersedes.fact: Responds to work emails in three focused blocks: early morning, lunch, and late evening

required_preferences.fact: Reserves Saturdays for wedding party rehearsals and planning, temporarily suspending youth soccer coaching when family obligations overlap
Blocks 30 minutes every morning for reviewing sales dashboards before responding to emails
Participates in cross-department working lunches at HQ twice a week, often sacrificing his preferred solo lunch for collaborative meals
Only drinks two cups of coffee before noon — avoids caffeine after midday

persona: A regional sales director overseeing a team of 15 representatives
